title: hephaestus-kit03-nbpro-redo
prompt:
Three references (house grammar). IMAGE 1 = STYLE reference — borrow clean painterly concept-art style, palette, finish. IMAGE 2 = the clean storyboard board — borrow world + consistency. IMAGE 3 = the IDENTITY reference for the smith Hephaestus — BORROW his exact face, age, hair, and beard; DO NOT borrow its grain or rendering.

CRITICAL — CHARACTER IDENTITY: Hephaestus is an OLDER, weary, careworn smith — ash-blond hair going grey, a full unkempt greying beard, a deeply LINED and weathered face, heavy tired eyes, a heavy stooped build. He is NOT young, NOT handsome, NOT heroic, NOT idealized or godlike. Match the identity reference (Image 3) exactly.

SHOT — CLOSE-UP: his weary, lined face in three-quarter, looking screen-right toward his work; tender, proud, a flicker of unease; gold automata and spark-glow soft and blurred behind him. Clean, smooth, finished painterly concept-art; cool blue gloom, warm spark-light. ONE full-frame image, 16:9 — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Render clean, smooth, finished painterly concept-art. CRITICAL: the smith is older, weary, lined, NOT young or idealized — match the identity reference. Cool blue/violet shadow, warm spark-light, no grain.
